common.footerAbout: Ordino is a full-service advertising agency based in London and Istanbul. With a strategy-first, creative, growth-focused approach, we serve global brands. We operate as an official advertising partner of Google, Meta, TikTok, and X.

metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Ordino is a full-service advertising agency based in London and Istanbul. As an official advertising partner of Google, Meta, TikTok, and X, we serve brands locally and globally.

editorialHero.title: London and Istanbul-based
editorialHero.prose1: Official advertising partner of Google, Meta, TikTok, and X.

howWeWork.title: 11 years of
howWeWork.description: Since 2015, we've served over 50 brands. We've managed hundreds of millions in ad spend across the UK, USA, and Türkiye, delivering thousands of campaigns. Our team brings together experienced strategists, performance specialists, and creative directors.

leadership.lead: Ordino's leadership team — six executives leading strategy, performance, design, and operations.

partnerLogos.title: Verified partnerships
partnerLogos.description: Our certified partner status with Google, Meta, Google Analytics, and TikTok gives your campaigns direct access to the latest tools, beta features, and expert support.

metadata.title: Services
metadata.description: Full-service, multidisciplinary advertising agency. Strategy, creativity, performance, analytics, growth, and digital experience.

pageHero.label: Our Services
pageHero.title: Full-service.
pageHero.sub: Strategy, creativity, performance media, analytics, growth, and digital experience — under one roof, with measurable results.

whatWeDo.titleHtml: We integrate data with creativity, building innovative solutions through multidisciplinary craft.

01.title: Media &
01.description: Programmatic advertising, TV-digital integration, creative campaigns, and media buying — an integrated media & advertising approach.

02.title: Social Media
02.description: From platform-specific content production to community management, from organic growth to influencer partnerships.

03.title: Content
03.description: Video, photo, copy, and graphic production. Creative content that fits your brand voice and each platform.

04.title: SEO & Organic
04.description: The foundation of long-term organic growth. From technical SEO to content strategy — we build lasting visibility.

05.title: Visual
05.description: Logo, corporate identity, campaign creative, packaging — we shape your brand's visual language.

06.title: Web Development &
06.description: Modern, fast, SEO-friendly websites. Built with Next.js, React, and a performance-first mindset.

07.title: eCommerce
07.description: Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom eCommerce platforms. Conversion-focused design and payment integrations.

08.title: Email &
08.description: Email marketing, automation, customer segmentation, and CRM integrations for sustainable customer relationships.

09.title: AI &
09.description: AI as a strategic tool. Data analytics, segmentation, creative processes, and campaign optimization.

01.title: Integrated media &
01.lead: We turn media and ad investment into a strategic capability — making sure the right message reaches the right person at the right time. From programmatic advertising and TV-digital integration to creative campaign concepts and production, we deliver an integrated approach.

02.title: Where your brand
02.lead: Social media is where your brand meets people. We own the entire process — from platform-specific content production to community management, organic growth to influencer partnerships. We focus on real connection, not vanity metrics.

03.title: Creative content
03.lead: Content bridges your brand and your audience. We produce video, photography, copy, and graphic work that fits your brand voice and works on every platform. Story-telling, copywriting, and creative direction — all under one roof.

04.title: Long-term
04.lead: SEO is the foundation of long-term organic growth. From technical SEO and content strategy to link authority and local search, we make sure your brand shows up for the right people on the right terms. We build lasting visibility.

05.title: We create brands
05.lead: Brand identity is more than visual consistency — it's a brand's soul. We design the full visual system that defines you — from logo and typography to color palette and brand guidelines, plus campaign creative, packaging, and presentations.

06.title: Modern, fast,
06.lead: Your website is your brand's digital storefront. We build fast, SEO-friendly, scalable sites using a modern stack (Next.js, React). Design, development, performance optimization, and ongoing maintenance — all in one place.

07.title: A conversion-focused
07.lead: eCommerce isn't just a store — it's an end-to-end user experience. We deliver conversion-focused, payment-integrated, mobile-friendly eCommerce solutions on Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom platforms.

08.title: Sustainable
08.lead: A customer relationship isn't a one-off sale — it's a long-term bond. Through email marketing, automation, and CRM integrations, we build sustainable, personalized communication. We turn data into value.

09.title: AI as
09.lead: AI is no longer a luxury — it's a competitive necessity. We use AI as a strategic tool across data analytics, customer segmentation, creative processes, and campaign optimization. Faster, smarter, more efficient.

analyticsBlock.title: One partner.
analyticsBlock.description: Our team works natively across every major ad platform — and the analytics infrastructure that connects them. That means your strategy stays integrated as you scale.
platforms: Google Ads — Search, Shopping, Performance Max

metadata.title: Platform
metadata.description: All Your Ads. ORDINO.AI. Build, manage, and optimize campaigns on TikTok, Meta, Google, and more — from a single AI-powered command center.

hero.subtitle: Build, manage, and optimize campaigns on TikTok, Meta, Google, and more — from a single AI-powered command center.

product.title: One command center for
product.description: Ordino AI unifies every ad account you run — TikTok, Meta, Google, LinkedIn — into a single operations surface. Plan, launch, and optimize from one place. The AI layer monitors performance 24/7 and takes action without your manual intervention.

01.title: Unified Campaigns
01.text: Build a campaign once, launch it across every channel. Creative variants, audiences, and budgets sync automatically — no tab-hopping.

02.title: AI Optimization
02.text: Our engine reads performance every 15 minutes — shifting budget, pausing losers, scaling winners — transparently, with every decision logged.

03.title: Negative Keywords
03.text: AI search-term analysis clears wasted Google spend in minutes, not hours. The average Ordino account eliminates 23% of wasted spend in the first week.

04.title: Creative Intelligence
04.text: Upload your ad variants — the engine tests them with disciplined measurement and surfaces the patterns that actually move your numbers, not just CTR.

05.title: Blended Reporting
05.text: ROAS, CAC, payback period, contribution margin — a single dashboard that ties ad spend to pipeline and revenue, not impressions.

06.title: Team Workflows
06.text: Approvals, notes, handoffs. Built for agencies and in-house teams running 20+ accounts without drowning in spreadsheets.

01.title: Ingest
01.text: Every 15 minutes, the engine pulls impression, click, conversion, and cost data from every platform you've connected. Nothing is sampled — we read the full account.

02.title: Reason
02.text: A model trained on 230 client accounts ranks every active asset by its contribution to your real business metric — not the platform's proxy score.

03.title: Act
03.text: Budget shifts, pauses, negative keyword pushes, creative rotations — executed automatically in your platform accounts, with a one-click reversible audit trail.

04.title: Report
04.text: Every action is logged in plain language. Your Monday report writes itself: what changed, why it changed, and how it moved the numbers.

stats.label: Wasted spend eliminated in week one
Pipeline velocity boost for B2B accounts

finalCta.title: Ready to stop managing and start
finalCta.description: Ordino AI is rolling out to a limited group in 2026. Request access — we'll activate your accounts within a week.

pushForward.title: We push
pushForward.text: At Ordino, we believe that every pound of ad spend should work harder. Our AI-powered platform goes beyond basic optimization — we understand the nuances of search intent, user behavior, and campaign dynamics. By combining cutting-edge machine learning with deep marketing expertise, we help brands maximize their ROAS while minimizing wasted spend.

powerOf.title: Performance Marketing
powerOf.sub: Where the world's ambitious brands come for measurable growth.

altText.turizm-bakanligi: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Culture and Tourism

aiata.title: Aiata Boats lifted booking conversion by
aiata.lead: For Aiata Boats, we own ad management across LinkedIn, Meta, and Google, plus visual design and SEO end-to-end. As the brand expanded geographically, we expanded with it — managing global social presence across Aiata Boats USA, Spain, and Greece. From email campaigns to event communications, content production to design, we deliver 360-degree service.
aiata.brandIntro: A rising name in luxury marine, Aiata Boats produces custom yachts and watercraft with a presence in Türkiye, the USA, Spain, and Greece. Through design quality and global vision, the brand has built a strong position in the premium marine segment.

challenge.head: Going global in
paragraphs: Expanding into new markets in premium marine requires more than visibility — proper positioning, sustainable communication, and performance-focused growth. Managing distinct presences across three geographies demands operational discipline.

solution.head: 360° service capacity and
paragraphs: We manage the brand's communication holistically — across creative, performance, content, and events. We balance the unique dynamics of each region with a local approach and global consistency.

gobritanya.title: GoBritanya delivered
gobritanya.lead: We manage Google and Meta ads, visual design, SEO, and website optimization in parallel. The ad campaigns drive over 1,000 customer conversions per month; every channel works within an integrated, measurable growth model.
gobritanya.brandIntro: GoBritanya offers comprehensive guidance to students worldwide on UK education, life, and immigration — a leading digital platform serving tens of thousands of users as a trusted resource.

challenge.head: Making the right decision easier
paragraphs: Going abroad for education is a complex, long decision process for students and families. Ads, content, web, and conversion all need to serve one goal — enrollment.

solution.head: An integrated
paragraphs: We built a measurable growth model that connects every channel. When ads, SEO, and web optimization work together, conversion becomes the natural outcome.

yuva-maya.title: Yuva Maya lifted product searches by
yuva-maya.lead: We led the launch of Yuva Maya's refreshed brand identity with synchronized campaigns across Google, Meta, TikTok, and more. The campaign reached 3 out of every 5 women in Türkiye. The launch film became the most-watched piece of content on the brand's YouTube channel. Through optimal media planning and real-time optimization, the brand's new era launched powerfully into digital.
yuva-maya.brandIntro: As the Türkiye brand of Lesaffre — the world's leading fermentation technology company — Yuva Maya is one of the strongest names in the yeast and flour category. With a vibrant digital community, an extensive recipe platform, and an innovation-first approach, the brand's growth accelerates year after year.

challenge.head: A strong digital launch
paragraphs: A brand identity refresh demands perfect timing to capture audience at launch. The brand needed a synchronized, high-visibility, emotionally resonant launch across a broad female audience.

solution.head: A synchronized, multi-platform
paragraphs: We built a synchronized cross-platform launch strategy backed by real-time media optimization. Each platform played to its strengths — all working to a single launch rhythm.

turkish-technic.title: Turkish Technic built
turkish-technic.lead: We launched and managed 100+ campaigns across LinkedIn, Google (YouTube), and Meta. Our campaigns reached over 50 million people globally — and a 72-hour YouTube ad became the most-watched video on Turkish Technic's channel. At international aviation trade shows, we ran end-to-end campaigns aimed at global attendees.
turkish-technic.brandIntro: The technical maintenance arm of Turkish Airlines, Turkish Technic is one of the most trusted MRO (Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul) companies in global aviation. Operating in 50+ countries, the company is a recognized force in the global aviation industry.

challenge.head: Hard-to-reach decision-makers
paragraphs: Ad investment in aviation looks nothing like mass marketing. Decision-makers are distributed globally, few in number, and highly specialized. The right channel, the right narrative, the right timing — there's no room for error.

solution.head: A multi-channel approach with
paragraphs: With the principle of professional messaging on professional channels, we designed platform-specific campaigns. We shaped investment strategy around the industry's tempo and trade show calendar.

tff.title: TFF launched
tff.lead: AI-powered ad film production sits at the center of our work with TFF. We redefined traditional production with AI — producing faster, more scalable content that pushes creative boundaries. These projects, which reached millions of football fans, demonstrate concretely how powerful AI-assisted media production can be for public sports institutions.
tff.brandIntro: TFF is the central governing authority of Turkish football, an institutional force followed closely by millions of fans through its national leagues and team organizations. At this intersection of sport and society, communication matters more than ever.

challenge.head: Redefining traditional
paragraphs: In large-scale institutional communication, speed and scale don't always come together with traditional production methods. Creative boundaries must expand without quality dropping.

solution.head: Scalable production
paragraphs: By integrating AI into the creative process, we expanded production speed and scale. Traditional quality met next-generation velocity.

turizm-bakanligi.title: The Ministry of Tourism delivered
turizm-bakanligi.titleTail: and lifted inbound search intent by 87%.
turizm-bakanligi.lead: Across projects with different directorates of the Ministry of Culture and Tourism, we deliver multi-channel ad management and digital communications strategy. To bring Türkiye's cultural heritage and tourism potential to broader audiences, we design platform-specific campaigns and build content strategy in an integrated framework. We meet the communication needs of a state-scale institution with a modern media approach.
turizm-bakanligi.brandIntro: Charged with carrying Türkiye's historic and cultural wealth to the world, the Ministry of Culture and Tourism runs one of the country's most powerful institutional communication platforms. Projects across its various directorates make national culture and tourism potential visible on a global scale.

challenge.head: Modern communication
paragraphs: Communication for public institutions carries both the duty of institutional accountability and the responsibility of reaching broad audiences. Modern media tools must meet a disciplined approach at state scale.

solution.head: Integrated
paragraphs: We brought the communications needs of different directorates into a single holistic strategy — aligning modern media practice with the responsibility of state-scale work.

allium-bodrum.title: Allium Bodrum accelerated season turnaround by
allium-bodrum.lead: For Allium Bodrum, we own digital ad management — ensuring the brand meets the right audience on the right platforms. With the aesthetic sensibility and precise targeting that boutique hospitality demands, we design every campaign in tune with the brand's identity.
allium-bodrum.brandIntro: One of Bodrum's most distinguished hotels, Allium offers a unique stay that blends the warmth of local culture with international comfort standards. With a boutique identity and meticulous service, it's one of the most respected names in luxury tourism.

challenge.head: Precision targeting
paragraphs: Ad investment in boutique hospitality demands a different discipline than mass campaigns. The high-value guest profile, aesthetic voice, and brand identity — all three must be preserved at every touchpoint.

solution.head: Campaigns designed in
paragraphs: We approach ad management not just as performance but as brand consistency. Every campaign is designed in an aesthetic language true to the brand's essence.

marie-claire.title: Marie Claire grew its digital subscriber base from
marie-claire.lead: For the Türkiye edition of Marie Claire — one of the world's most recognized women's magazines — we run an SEO-focused digital growth strategy. Through integrated content optimization, keyword strategy, and technical SEO, we grow organic traffic sustainably. We support the digital visibility of a strong editorial legacy with data-driven methods. Alongside this, our high-visibility advertising and follower-acquisition campaigns have reached 10M+ women domestically.
marie-claire.brandIntro: The Türkiye edition of Marie Claire reaches millions of readers through its established editorial identity and strong digital platforms. It remains a defining reference in fashion, beauty, and lifestyle.

challenge.head: Sustaining editorial identity
paragraphs: Growing a heritage editorial brand in digital depends on organic traffic and social reach scaling together. SEO and advertising must feed each other.

solution.head: Data-driven,
paragraphs: We integrated content optimization, keyword strategy, and technical SEO with ad management — backing the editorial legacy's digital impact with data.

fortune.title: Fortune lifted premium content engagement by
fortune.lead: For Fortune Türkiye — the pulse of the business world — we manage targeted ad campaigns on LinkedIn and X (formerly Twitter). We reach the readership, spanning C-suite executives to young professionals, on the right channels with the right message. We build the serious, effective voice that business communication demands — in harmony with the brand's identity.
fortune.brandIntro: Following the pulse of business, Fortune Türkiye is one of the country's leading business and economy publications — producing content for a broad readership that spans C-suite executives to young professionals.

challenge.head: Tone and channel precision
paragraphs: Reaching decision-maker professionals takes a different discipline than mass advertising. Which channel, what tone, which message — every detail must align with brand identity.

solution.head: The right tone
paragraphs: We advertise to target profiles, not just target audiences. By blending business language with brand identity, we build communication that's both serious and effective.

anadolu-motor.title: Anadolu Motor lifted test-drive bookings by
anadolu-motor.titleTail: and cut cost per lead by
anadolu-motor.lead: For Anadolu Motor, we support email campaigns, website optimization, and copywriting. At every touchpoint, we build a consistent, clear, persuasive voice — strengthening the brand's digital presence.
anadolu-motor.brandIntro: One of Türkiye's most established automotive distributors, Anadolu Motor remains a trusted, recognized name in the industry — backed by a broad dealer network and a diverse brand portfolio.

challenge.head: A digital voice for
paragraphs: For a heritage automotive brand, consistency, simplicity, and persuasive power matter most in digital communication. Email, web, copy — every touchpoint must speak the same language.

solution.head: A unified
paragraphs: We manage every touchpoint with the same linguistic discipline. Email, web, and copy form a single, coherent, persuasive flow.

instyle.title: Global aesthetic,
instyle.lead: For InStyle Türkiye — one of the leading names in fashion and lifestyle — we own ad management and content strategy. We keep the brand's dynamic, inspiring voice alive on digital platforms, designing every campaign to speak to local audiences while preserving InStyle's global aesthetic.
instyle.brandIntro: An international reference in fashion and lifestyle, InStyle stands out as one of Türkiye's most active style and trend platforms. Blending global vision with a local touch, the brand remains a powerful, inspiring voice in digital.

challenge.head: Telling a global brand's story
paragraphs: For the local edition of an international brand, the right balance between global aesthetic and local tone must be struck. Brand voice must stay consistent across every platform.

solution.head: Platform management
paragraphs: We design every campaign in a local voice without compromising the global aesthetic, keeping the brand's voice alive and consistent across digital platforms.

inspera.title: A consistent brand voice for a
inspera.lead: For Inspera — built at the heart of Bodrum's culture and arts scene — we own digital ad management. From Livaneli Stage to the Art Academy, from Voyn Kitchen & Bar to the Design Store, we design targeted campaigns that connect this multi-layered experience with the right audience, carrying the brand's distinct voice across every platform.
inspera.brandIntro: Inspera Bodrum Culture & Arts brings culture, art, and life under one roof — with its stages, art academy, gastronomy, and design store. Adding color to Bodrum's cultural scene, this distinct venue gains national attention through the stage that bears Zülfü Livaneli's name.

challenge.head: Telling a multi-layered venue
paragraphs: A stage, an academy, a restaurant, and a store — all at once. Each unit addresses a different audience, but the brand's unity must hold at every touchpoint.

solution.head: Targeted campaigns,
paragraphs: While we set separate audience strategies for each unit, we preserve the brand's distinct voice in every campaign — with flexible planning that matches the event calendar's tempo.

bios.oguzOzbenli: Founder of Ordino. Leads business development, marketing strategy, and brand partnerships across the agency. Brings a commercial lens to every engagement — translating campaign complexity into growth outcomes brands can measure.
bios.handeAris: Strategic partner and executive lead. Architect of Ordino's digital marketing approach. Leads long-term partnerships from 360° campaign strategy to brand positioning.
bios.ilaydaOzcan: Head of marketing and communications. Owns brand voice, creative content strategy, and PR end-to-end. Carries Ordino's story — and its clients' — into the world.
bios.ugurOzbenli: Head of operations. Keeps everything flowing — from agency processes and client management to resource planning and delivery tracking. Runs the engines behind Ordino.
bios.omerToraman: Head of performance marketing. Owns campaign management, optimization, and ROAS maximization across Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, and beyond. Data-driven, results-obsessed.
bios.halisBattal: Head of design and media production. Leads visual identity, video production, motion graphics, and digital design end-to-end. The quality bar for Ordino's creative output.

section.description: From creative to ad performance, strategic planning to digital production — Ordino operates as a 28-person team working at the intersection of four disciplines.
